claimText: QNu Labs successfully demonstrated India's first extensive Quantum Key Distribution (QKD) network.
evidenceExcerpt: Startup QNu Labs... successfully demonstrated India's first extensive QKD network
examUse: Statement-based question identifying the entity behind India's first extensive QKD network.
distractorHooks: Attributing the achievement to ISRO, DRDO, or C-DAC instead of QNu Labs

claimText: The first extensive Quantum Key Distribution (QKD) network demonstrated in India spans a distance of over 500 kilometers.
examUse: Fact-check statement regarding the operational range of India's demonstrated QKD network.
distractorHooks: Claiming the network spans only a few kilometers (e.g., 5 km) or an exaggerated distance (e.g., 5000 km)

claimText: The initiative by QNu Labs to demonstrate India's first extensive QKD network is supported under the National Quantum Mission (NQM).
evidenceExcerpt: supported under the National Quantum Mission (NQM)
examUse: Statement-based question linking technological milestones to their supporting government missions.
distractorHooks: Claiming support from the National Supercomputing Mission or a foreign space agency
